steps.title: Find the key linguistic signal
steps.content: The phrase “is sure to be invaluable” projects confidence about the model's future usefulness.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choice
steps.content:
Choice B names what the sentence does: it emphasizes the potential utility of the team's model.

A misreads what the passage discusses (Boston is only an example of a neighborhood), while C and D misidentify what's being evaluated — neither algorithm accuracy nor a problem to overcome, but the model's projected value.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
